MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS MIRA BLANCHARD, RYAN COOPER, AND MARK DAVIS' MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER.

Plaintiffs' motion to strike Defendants Fluent LLC, Reward Zone USA LLC, RewardsFlow LLC, American Prize Center LLC, and Mohit Singla's "Notice of Filing Answer" is granted. Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 430.90(a)(2) and California Rule of Court 2.111, Defendant must file an answer with the name of this court and the case number on it within 30 days of remand from federal court. A "Notice of Filing Answer" is not the same thing as an answer. Defendants' reliance upon Laguna Village, Inc. v. Laborers' Int'l Union of North America (1983) 35 Cal.App.3d 174, 182 is misplaced because that case merely prevents Plaintiffs from taking Defendants' default; it does not stand for the proposition that the "Notice of Filing Answer" in federal court is a proper replacement for an answer in state court. Defendants shall file an answer with this Court in compliance with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.90(a)(2).

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
